/CAL: SENTENCE/AJW/CH9:ISS:PROB 3 Y:PJ 5 M/CTS: 43/WS/WEAP/X: THE DEFENDANT SHALL PAY RESTITUTION ASSOCIATED WITH COUNTS 1, 8, 9 AND 10/SA2: PABLORAMOS MENCHU, JOSE JAVIER TORRES, LEO SOTO/SAORD4: 150 YARDS/SA4: SAFEWAY AT 735 7TH AVENUE, SF/DNACOMP/IND/VF4:300/PC/PSR/BKFEE/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/DISM3/CTORD: THE SAME SENTENCE IS IMPOSED ON COUNTS 9 AND 10 AND THE SENTENCES ARE CONCURRENT/CTORD: PROBATION VIOLATION EXPOSURE ON COUNTS 9 AND 10 SHALL BE CONSECUTIVE AND NOT CONCURRENT//CTORD: DEFENDANT TO PARTICIPATE IN ANIMAL CONTROL TRAINING WITH HIS DOG  MAGIC /

/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING/X: THE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO MODIFY THE COMPLAINT TO ADD FELONY COUNTS 9- 245(A)4-PC & COUNT 10- 487(A)PC/TEXT:DEFT ADV& PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:  9 & 10 /FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES: 12-12-17/X: RESTITUTION TO BE DETERMINED BY APD/X: IF DEFENDANT SUFFERS NO NEW ARREST AFTER HE HAS SERVED HALF OF THE TERMOF HIS PROBATION, HE CAN PETITION FOR THIS CASE TO BE REDUCED TO A MISDEMEANOR AND TO SERVE THE REMAINDER OF THE SENTENCE ON COURT PROBATION/X: HARVEY WAIVER ANY RESTITUTION FROM THE DISMISSED COUNTS/X: BALANCE OF THE COMPLAINT TO BE DISMISSED AT THE TIME OF SENTENCING/
